name: Perfect Fifths
description: The perfect fifth — the strongest interval in music. Root, up a fifth, back down.

feedback.intro: A perfect fifth is 7 semitones — think the first two notes of 'Twinkle Twinkle'. Jump clean.
feedback.waiting: Root note first, then jump up...
feedback.tip: Fifths have a natural resonance — when you nail one, you can almost feel it vibrate. That's the harmonic series at work.
